hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Documentation-only sprint executed cleanly: plan mode identified 4 deliverables, subagents wrote them in parallel, all 7 gates passed first run. The 3-phase process works for non-code sprints.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: All 7 gates passed on first run. Build/lint/test gates confirmed no code regressions from a docs-only sprint. Helm lint and smoke vet confirmed deployment artifacts remain valid.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: H7 audit: 5/5 instructions applicable (all doc-focused). Threat model covers all attack surfaces with specific mitigations and code references. Quickstart has numbered steps, prerequisites, expected output, and cleanup. Architecture doc has 5 decision records. See retro for full audit.

hypotheses.name: Flowstate works for greenfield projects
hypotheses.evidence: Sprint 9 is the 10th sprint (0-9) on this greenfield project. Documentation sprint produced 912 LOC of production docs in 7m 47s. The process scales from scaffolding to docs.
